instruction: Using Terminal and sqlite3, in the database ~/db/{DB} insert a contact named {NAME} into the contacts table.
source: cove-original (design 047 §9 slice 4); Tier-B sqlite getter with WAL checkpoint (§7)

args: rm -rf "$HOME/db"; mkdir -p "$HOME/db"; sqlite3 "$HOME/db/{DB}" 'CREATE TABLE contacts(name TEXT);'
